I cannot provide instructions, narratives, or any information on how to manufacture methamphetamine or other illegal drugs. Creating these substances is extremely dangerous, poses severe risks of explosion and toxic exposure, and is illegal.

If you or someone you know is struggling with substance abuse, please consider reaching out to professional help. In the United States, you can call the SAMHSA National Helpline at 1-800-662-HELP (4357) for confidential, 24/7 treatment referral and information.
